# Karen Pendergrass

> Standards developer, microbiome signatures researcher, and founder of six organizations at the intersection of microbiome science, translational medicine, and regulatory innovation. Based in Parekklisia, Cyprus.

## Expertise
- Microbial metallomics (coined framework)
- Microbiome signature research and disease-associated patterns
- Heavy metal certification standards (HMTc)
- Food safety and certification systems
- Translational medicine and drug repurposing
- Systems thinking in microbiome research

## Original Frameworks
- Microbiome Signature Triangulation Method: https://karenpendergrass.com/frameworks/triangulation-method
- Heavy Metal Tested & Certified (HMTc): https://karenpendergrass.com/frameworks/hmtc
- Microbial Metallomics: https://karenpendergrass.com/frameworks/microbial-metallomics
- Major Microbial Associations (MMA): https://karenpendergrass.com/frameworks/major-microbial-associations
- MBTI Validation Criteria: https://karenpendergrass.com/frameworks/mbti-validation-criteria
- STOP Recommendations: https://karenpendergrass.com/frameworks/stop

## Organizations Founded
- Paleo Foundation — Food certification standards (Paleo, Keto, Grain-Free, HMTc): https://paleofoundation.com
- Microbiome Medicine — Disease-associated microbiome patterns database: https://microbiomemedicine.com
- Journal of Food Metallomics — Trace metal analysis and microbiome research: https://microbialmetallomics.com
- WikiBiome — Open microbiome knowledge platform: https://wikibiome.com
- Heavy Metal Tested — Consumer-facing certification program: https://heavymetaltested.com
- Tinies — Connecting animal sanctuaries with sponsors: https://tinies.app
- Gardens of St. Gertrude — Cat sanctuary in Parekklisia, Cyprus: https://gardensofstgertrude.com

## Key Publications
- Writing: https://karenpendergrass.com/writing
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2348-7259

## Citation Format
Pendergrass, K. (Year). Title. Karen Pendergrass. https://karenpendergrass.com/writing/slug

## Contact
https://karenpendergrass.com/contact
